overall.description: Gameplay footage from an open-world action game set in ancient Greece, showing a character walking through a sunlit temple plaza with classical architecture, transitioning to a cinematic aerial view of the city of Thebes at sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek temple plaza with ceremonial banners and marble statues

armed guard standing watch near the temple steps

large white marble statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
tall pole with hanging green and gold fabric decorations
tall pole with hanging green and gold fabric decorations
rocky mountain peak rising behind the temple complex

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit ancient Greek plaza paved with marble tiles scattered with red flower petals. A grand classical temple with purple banners sits at the top of stairs ahead, flanked by tall ceremonial banners. Other citizens populate the plaza, including one stretching near a stone balustrade on the right, while cypress trees and flowering bushes line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of ancient Thebes at golden hour

events.description: fade from black reveals aerial cinematic view of ancient city at sunset
white text 'THEBES' appears in the center of the frame

agents.ego_description: camera slowly pans across the ancient cityscape showcasing the architecture during sunset

entered.detail: cluster of ancient buildings with red clay tiled roofs
stone houses and structures of the ancient city
large religious structure with columns visible on the right side
dramatic sunset sky with golden light breaking through scattered clouds
white capital letters spelling 'THEBES' overlaid on the city view

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a cinematic aerial view of ancient Thebes during golden hour. The camera pans across terracotta rooftops and stone buildings as the sun sets behind distant mountains, casting warm light across the city. White text reading 'THEBES' appears in the center of the frame, identifying the location.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within a detailed temple plaza and ascends into a sweeping aerial vista of a sprawling city at sunset. It begins at ground level, following a character across marble tiles scattered with red petals toward a grand classical temple adorned with purple banners. As the camera moves past citizens and cypress trees lining the walkway, the perspective shifts upward, leaving the plaza behind to expand into a cinematic bird's-eye view of ancient Thebes. The scene then opens across a landscape of terracotta rooftops and stone buildings as the lighting transforms into a warm golden hour glow with the sun dipping behind distant mountains. Finally, the camera pans across the city skyline as the text THEBES appears in the center of the frame.
